title: TomiOptimize
description:
Optimized Minecraft modpack for better performance even on low-spec computers. Includes essential utility mods.
Regular updates ensure the best gaming experience on lower-end systems.
body:
# What's This? It is optimized modpack.
If you get low fps, use this modpack.
It has some useful mods such as capes, fullbright and optimize mods. # What's different? This is a modpack for optimization purposes only.
I've added some utility mods here, but they hardly impact vanilla Minecraft. Only essential utilities have been included.
Especially, we've incorporated Methane, which offers the Fullbright feature. This is a dual-purpose mode that not only optimizes for removing light engines but also provides the Fullbright feature!
I will periodically update the mod list, incorporating any newly discovered optimization mods. Therefore, I aim to maximize optimization more than any other mod pack, ensuring the best gaming experience even on low-spec computers.
